## QA checklist

- [ ] README still has one obvious Start Here action.
- [ ] `install.html` still avoids unsupported deep-link claims.
- [ ] All `SKILL.md` copies are synchronized.
- [ ] YAML files parse.
- [ ] HTML parses.
- [ ] SVG assets include `<title>` and `<desc>`.
- [ ] User-facing content does not lead with terminal setup.
- [ ] `TESTING.md` playbooks are updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] Eval tasks are updated when behavior changes.
